category: Learning Education and Student Developer Packs
description: Free learning platforms, certification prep, and bundled developer tool packs for students and educators.

entries.name: GitHub Student Developer Pack
entries.summary: Bundle of free access/credits to dozens of developer tools (domains, hosting, APIs, IDEs) for verified students.
entries.freeTier: Free for the duration of verified student status; bundle composition changes periodically.

entries.name: freeCodeCamp
entries.summary: Full-length, project-based curriculum covering web development, data science, and more, with free certifications.

entries.name: The Odin Project
entries.summary: Free, open-source full-stack web development curriculum built and maintained by its community.

entries.name: MDN Web Docs
entries.summary: Mozilla's comprehensive, authoritative reference documentation for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and web APIs.
entries.freeTier: Completely free reference and learning content.

entries.name: Roadmap.sh
entries.summary: Community-driven learning roadmaps for dozens of tech career paths, with interactive guides and projects.
entries.freeTier: Free roadmaps and guides; some premium courses/projects are paid.
entries.paidFrom: Pro plan from ~$9/month for premium content.

entries.name: Exercism
entries.summary: Free coding exercises across 70+ languages with human mentoring feedback on submitted solutions.

entries.name: Coursera (Financial Aid / Free Audits)
entries.summary: University-partnered courses and certificates; most courses can be audited free, with paid certificates.
entries.freeTier: Free audit access to course materials (no certificate) for most courses.

entries.name: Khan Academy
entries.summary: Free courses spanning computer science fundamentals, math, and more, run by a nonprofit.

entries.name: LeetCode
entries.summary: Coding interview practice platform with thousands of algorithm/data-structure problems.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with access to most problems and basic discussion forums.
entries.paidFrom: Premium plan from $35/month for company-tagged problems and extra solutions.

entries.name: JetBrains Student License
entries.summary: Free access to the full JetBrains IDE suite (IntelliJ, PyCharm, WebStorm, etc.) for verified students/educators.
entries.freeTier: Free for the duration of verified academic status.
